Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-12 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows two exceptionally strong momentum candidates leading the 700-ticker universe. RCAT ranks #1 with a composite score of 98.2, driven by exceptional consistency across all timeframes (1-year return of 235.66%) and perfect SMA alignment above all four moving averages, though its ratio consistency shows a notable weakness at the 6-month level (1.02x). CENX ranks second with a 1-year return of 218.59% and stands out for explosive intermediate momentum, particularly the 3-month ratio of 8.18x, suggesting a sharp acceleration phase; however, it lags RCAT in near-term resilience based on a lower bad_spy_score (1.65 vs 4.37). Both tickers pass the ratio consistency threshold (4 out of 5 ratios meeting criteria) and trade well above all major moving averages, indicating strong structural health. The key differentiator is RCAT's superior performance on down-SPY days and more balanced return acceleration across all holding periods, while CENX shows bumpier but still powerful growth concentrated in mid-to-long term windows.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
